{{CargoOrgan
|name=Hyper-Fusion
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10961
|idx=154
|description=Best way to avoid copyright claims? Dissect source material to molecular level before reassembling. When even the creator can't recognize it, you've succeeded!
-Copyright Evasion Guide
|skill=
|hp=2830
|def=238
|atk=246
|rush=303
|gene1=Per 10 Gene Seg. devoured, {race} RUSH +7
Specimen devoured: 400/400
|gene2=Fire DMG +2%
|gene3=Craft 1 Blue Organ Slime: 10% chance to get 1 more.
|gene4=Water DMG +2%
|gene5=Craft 1 Purple Organ Slime: Gain 1 more by 10%
|gene6=All Cathay General Stats +4%
|gene7=All Cathay General Stats +4% (Awakened)
|}}
